name: devview
description: DevView compiles Maintainability Graph context into View Trees, Context Packs, AI instructions, evidence, and guarded graph updates for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Graph-source development control, bounded views, evidence, and review workflow for Codex.
interface.longDescription: DevView gives AI agents a bounded developer view before they change code. It links intent, code, tasks, tests, evidence, decisions, and graph updates in a Maintainability Graph, projects task-specific View Trees, packages Context Packs, generates AI-facing Instruction Packs, records Runtime Evidence, proposes Graph Deltas, and keeps guarded graph updates behind explicit human review and validation. DevView is not an executor, approval system, enforcement switch, branch protection manager, runtime Evidence satisfaction engine, equivalence proof engine, or automatic graph update applier.
capabilities: Visual Design Contract generation for UI visual work
Design token and component style contract generation
UI surface inventory and visual evidence audit
CLI-assisted DevView validation and advisory checks
